sentence: The master craftsman trained his apprentice for years.

Le maître artisan a formé son apprenti pendant des années.
Call me master, she whispered submissively.

Nenn mich Meister, flüsterte sie unterwürfig.
The master owned hundreds of slaves on his plantation.
